A.psychologicalArchetype: Steady Accountable — calm authority, evidence-first, ambiguity-tolerant
proofStripMetrics: 42,000+ users onboarded across government and NHS

hardBans: Do not invent or state exact NATO programme budget figures.
Do not name specific Private Equity (PE) client logos or portfolio companies; use generic 'PE-backed client' phrasing instead.
Do not claim sole ownership of FTTH, carve-out, or separation programme strategy.
Do not describe the candidate as clinically neurodivergent (e.g. ADHD, autism, dyslexia).
qualifiers: When referencing NATO or defence work, focus on scope, outcomes, and responsibilities without stating budgets.
When referencing PE work, use terms like 'PE-backed client', 'portfolio company', or 'sponsor-backed organisation'.
When referencing FTTH or carve-out/separation work, frame the candidate as a contributing programme / workstream lead.
Use occupational-strength language such as 'rapid pattern recognition', 'high-context switching tolerance'.

A.groupingStrategy: Group short or overlapping interim engagements under Hiloka Limited as the primary consulting entity, and use competency-based grouping (e.g. Cloud Migration, JML & Access Modernisation, Datacentre & Network Transformation) for older projects.

hardBans: Do not invent or state exact NATO programme budget figures.
Do not name specific Private Equity (PE) client logos.
Do not describe the candidate as clinically neurodivergent.
Do not claim PMO-only roles; emphasise hands-on delivery ownership.
qualifiers: When referencing NATO or defence work, focus on scope, outcomes, and responsibilities without stating budgets.
When referencing PE work, use generic phrasing ('PE-backed client').
Use occupational-strength language instead of clinical labels.

B.groupingStrategy: Same Hiloka-led grouping as Lane A; emphasise delivery cadence and cross-functional tracking. Surface RAID logs, dependency mapping, and JML/ServiceNow.

C.psychologicalArchetype: Operational Authority — direct, diagnostic, commercial instinct, vendor/P&L accountability
proofStripMetrics: 4 data centres migrated to cloud-first operations

hardBans: Do not invent or state exact NATO programme budget figures.
Do not name specific Private Equity client logos.
Do not claim sole ownership of FTTH or carve-out strategy.
Do not describe the candidate as clinically neurodivergent.
qualifiers: When referencing NATO or defence work, focus on scope and outcomes; no budgets.
When referencing PE work, use generic phrasing.
Use occupational-strength language instead of clinical labels.

C.groupingStrategy: Group roles to emphasise run-rate reduction, P&L impact, and vendor/SLA ownership across multiple sites.
